## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do? -->

## Why

<!-- The problem it solves or the capability it adds. Link the issue if there is one: Fixes #123 -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands you ran, what you saw. Be specific. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test` are clean
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds (required if you touched a plugin's `tools.ts`)
- [ ] New behavior has a test, or I explain why it does not need one
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] For a new plugin: it follows the SKILL v2 contract (see `docs/skill-authoring.md`)
